awesomeListMeta.description: Catalog of Redux Libraries & Learning Material

nodes.itemHTML:
• Redux's concepts

    Redux official documentation does a great job at explaining Redux's core principles.

• Why immutable data structures

    The guide on performance of React's official documentation explains well what immutable data structures are and why they play an important role.

• Side Effects

    Redux Loop's readmestars2k gives a good insight on Side Effects in the context of Redux.
• redux-shipstars615 - Composable, testable and typable side effects.
• redux-transducersstars130 - Transducer utilities for Redux.
• Reddit

• redux-tiny-routerstars130 - Router made for Redux and made for universal apps. Stop using the router as a controller, it's just state.
• redux-corestars42 - Minimal Redux.
• redux-bug-reporterstars689 - Bug reporter and bug playback tool for Redux.
• redux-electron-storestars375 - Redux store enhancer that allows automatic synchronization between electron processes.
• kasiastars218 - React Redux toolset for the WordPress API.
• redux-ormstars3k - Small, simple and immutable ORM to manage relational data in your Redux store.
• redux-modifiersstars159 - Collection of generic functions for writing Redux reducers to operate on various data structures.
• redux-sagastars22.3k - Alternative side effect model for Redux apps.
• redux-effectsstars492 - You write pure functions, redux-effects handles the rest.
• redux-loopstars2k - Port of elm-effects and the Elm Architecture to Redux that allows you to sequence your effects naturally and purely by returning them from your reducers.
• redux-actstars1.5k - Opinionated lib to create actions and reducers for Redux.
• redux-crudstars632 - Set of standard actions and reducers for Redux CRUD Applications.
• redux-devtools-chart-monitorstars294 - Chart monitor for Redux DevTools.
• redux-devtools-dispatchstars145 - Dispatch your actions manually to test if your app Reacts well.
• redux-devtools-dock-monitorstars402 - Resizable and movable dock for Redux DevTools monitors.
• redux-test-recorderstars492 - Redux middleware to automatically generate tests for reducers through ui interaction.
• redux-form-material-uistars834 - Set of wrapper components to facilitate using Material UI with Redux Form.
• redux-async-connectstars649 - It allows you to request async data, store them in Redux state and connect them to your React component.
• redux-formstars12.6k - Higher Order Component using react-redux to keep form state in a Redux store.
• redux-uistars640 - Easy UI state management for React Redux.
• rx-reduxstars421 - Reimplementation of Redux using RxJS.
• redux-rxstars1k - RxJS utilities for Redux.
• redux-clistars890 - Opinionated CLI for building Redux/React apps quicker.

• universal-reduxstars462 - Npm package that lets you jump right into coding React and Redux with universal (isomorphic) rendering. Only manage Express setups or Webpack configurations if you want to.
• generator-react-aspnet-boilerplatestars284 - Starting point for building isomorphic React applications with ASP.NET Core 1, leveraging existing techniques.
• socratesstars579 - Small (8kb), batteries-included Redux store to reduce boilerplate and promote good habits.
• redux-ignorestars841 - Higher-order reducer to ignore Redux actions.
• redux-loggerstars5.7k - Logger middleware for Redux.
• redux-undostars2.8k - Higher order reducer to add undo/redo functionality to Redux state containers.
• redux-storagestars675 - Persistence layer for Redux with flexible backends.
• redux-persiststars12.4k - Persist and rehydrate a Redux store.
• redux-diff-loggerstars177 - Diff logger between states for Redux.
• react-router-reduxstars7.9k - Ruthlessly simple bindings to keep react-router and Redux in sync.
• redux-react-localstars373 - Local component state via Redux.
• backbone-reduxstars189 - Easy way to keep your backbone collections and Redux store in sync.
• redux-falcorstars369 - Connect your Redux front-end to your falcor back-end.
• deku-reduxstars31 - Bindings for Redux in deku < v2.
• redux-logicstars1.8k - Redux middleware for organizing business logic and action side effects.
• redux-observablestars7.8k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
• remote-redux-devtoolsstars1.8k - Redux DevTools remotely.
• redux-observablestars7.8k - RxJS middleware for action side effects in Redux using "Epics".
• redurxstars97 - Redux'ish Functional State Management using RxJS.
• redux-rollbar-middleware - Redux middleware that wraps exceptions in actions and sends them to Rollbar with current state.
• redux-schemastars157 - Automatic actions, reducers and validation for Redux.
• redux-tcombstars212 - Immutable and type-checked state and actions for Redux.
• redux-action-treestars227 - The Cerebral signals running with Redux.
• redux-elmstars496 - The Elm Architecture in JavaScript.
• redux-api-middlewarestars1.5k - Redux middleware for calling an API.
• rereducestars166 - Reducer library for Redux.
• redux-searchstars1.4k - Redux bindings for client-side search.
• redux-immutablestars1.9k - Redux-immutable is used to create an equivalent function of Redux combineReducers that works with Immutable.js state.
• reselectstars18.8k - Selector library for Redux.
• redux-requestsstars245 - Manages in-flight requests with a Redux reducer to avoid issuing duplicate requests.
• redux-promise-middlewarestars2k - Redux middleware for resolving and rejecting promises with conditional optimistic updates.
• redux-thunkstars17.4k - Thunk middleware for Redux.
• redux-connectstars549 - Provides decorator for resolving async props in react-router, extremely useful for handling server-side rendering in React.
• redux-side-effectsstars182 - Redux toolset for keeping all the side effects inside your reducers while maintaining their purity.
• redux-devtools-inspectorstars240 - Another Redux DevTools Monitor.
• redux-devtoolsstars13.1k - DevTools for Redux with hot reloading, action replay, and customizable UI.
• redux-devtools-filterable-log-monitorstars154 - Filterable tree view monitor for Redux DevTools.
• redux-devtools-log-monitorstars312 - The default monitor for Redux DevTools with a tree view.
• react-reduxstars22.4k - Official React bindings for Redux.
• react-easy-universal - Universal Routing & Rendering with React & Redux was too hard. Now it's easy.
• redux-routerstars2.3k - Redux bindings for React Router – keep your router state inside your Redux store.
• ground-controlstars263 - Scalable reducer management & powerful data fetching for React Router & Redux.
• react-redux-formstars2.1k - Create forms easily in React with Redux.
• redux-actionsstars6.6k - Flux Standard Action utilities for Redux.
• redux-promisestars2.7k - FSA-compliant promise middleware for Redux.
• reactuatestars490 - React/Redux stack (not a boilerplate kit).
• react-chrome-extension-boilerplatestars2.1k - Boilerplate for Chrome Extension React.js project.
• generator-reduxstars251 - CLI tools for Redux: next-gen functional Flux/React with devtools.
• generator-react-webpack-reduxstars552 - React Webpack Generator including Redux support.
